MacroActivity.Title: Macro
MacroActivity.Hint: Runs a linked Foundry macro or inline JavaScript when activated.

MacroUuid.Label: Macro UUID
MacroUuid.Hint: Drop a macro from the Macro Directory here or enter its UUID.

Command.Label: JavaScript code
Command.Hint: actor, token, item, activity, event, message, and results are available. Code runs with the executing user's permissions.

Error.NotFound: The linked macro could not be found.

ItemPiles.AdapterConflict: Black Flag Improvements now includes the Item Piles integration. Disable “Item Piles: Black Flag / Tales of the Valiant” to avoid conflicts.
ItemPiles.Error: The Black Flag integration for Item Piles failed: {message}

Settings.Name: Custom Weapon Traits
Settings.Label: Configure weapon traits
Settings.Title: Custom Properties and Weapon Options
Settings.Hint: Define custom weapon traits and optional mechanics.
Settings.Explanation: Properties and Weapon Options subsequently appear on weapons. Depending on the mechanic, attack modes, abilities, reach, or rolls are changed. Unused parameters are ignored. Changes require a restart.
Settings.Duplicate: Every Property and Weapon Option needs a unique ID.

Macro.Title: Chat Card Macro
Macro.Hint: When a macro is configured for the selected source, an additional button appears next to Attack and Damage. actor, token, item, activity, event, message, definition, targets, and lastAttack are available.
Macro.NotFound: The configured macro or weapon option was not found.
Macro.NoPermission: You do not own this weapon.

Enchantment.Title: Weapon Enchantment
Enchantment.Hint: Enchants a selected weapon and can change its ability, damage, and magical status.
Enchantment.AbilityHint: Spellcasting first uses the spell origin's ability (for example Cleric or Wizard). Without a specific origin, the best available spellcasting ability is used.
Enchantment.DurationHint: 0 means unlimited. The effect can always be deleted from the chat card or the weapon's effect manager.
Enchantment.NothingToRemove: No matching weapon enchantment was found.
